name: ShadowRealm
tagline: Personal sandbox — experimental builds, prototypes, and things that have no business existing
description: ShadowRealm is where ideas go when they're too weird or too early for a real project. Prototypes, engine experiments, half-baked concepts (pun intended), and things I built just to see if I could. Not everything in here works. That's the point.
forWho: Curious developers and anyone who appreciates the messy, honest side of building. This is the sketchbook, not the gallery.
story: Every builder has a junk drawer. This is mine — made public. I got tired of the idea that every project on a portfolio has to be polished and production-ready. Some of the best things I've learned came from projects that completely failed. ShadowRealm is where that happens in the open.
details: Various languages and frameworks depending on the experiment. No consistent stack. Check individual branches and folders for what's in there.
